svg.title: Paper lifecycle and commands v3
svg.desc: Flowchart showing six stages from signal detection to submission, with Research Monitor as the entry point

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Research Monitor agent do?')
sendPrompt('Show me the FROM_IDEA workflow')
sendPrompt('Show me how SEARCH and MAP work')
sendPrompt('How does the NotebookLM synthesis stage work?')
sendPrompt('Show me Stage 4 and Stage 5 structure and drafting')
sendPrompt('Show me the REVISE and FROM_DRAFT workflows')
sendPrompt('How does the Research Monitor feed into FROM_IDEA?')
sendPrompt('Run FROM_IDEA on my current paper idea')
sendPrompt('Run DEVELOP on my current paper idea')
sendPrompt('Search for papers with SEARCH:')
sendPrompt('Run MAP on my literature topic')
sendPrompt('Run ANALYZE on a specific paper')
sendPrompt('Show me the NotebookLM prompts for Stage 2')
sendPrompt('Show me the Stage 3 transfer template')
sendPrompt('Show me Stage 4 literature structure prompt')
sendPrompt('Show me Stage 5 section drafting prompts')
sendPrompt('Show me the contribution statement prompt')
sendPrompt('Run REVISE on a paragraph')
sendPrompt('Run FROM_DRAFT on my draft')
sendPrompt('Show me the submission checklist')
